api_key_hint: Stays only in the browser (localStorage). Create/manage it on console.groq.com/keys.
model_pick_title: Pipeline model — used by AI Chat only
model_actions_hint: Pick the model next to the input field: the pipeline talks only to that one.
teacher_note: The key above stays only in this browser (this chat's sandbox) and is not written to the device. To give ANIMA — the whole OS's online mind — a key, manage it in Settings ▸ AI: that's the only place that configures the device.
welcome: You talk directly to the model (Groq). No ANIMA processing.
set_key_to_start: Set your API key in ⚙ to get started.
need_key: An API key is required — open it in ⚙.
err_proxy_unreachable: Can't reach the device's /api/llm proxy. Start the simulator (node tools/serve-shell.mjs) or check the device connection.
err_bad_key: Invalid or unauthorized key — check it in ⚙.
err_no_endpoint: /api/llm endpoint missing: update the firmware/simulator with the LLM proxy.
teach_active: Active — ANIMA learns from misses (offline, only facts verified against a source).
teach_need_key: Enter the API key above first.
teach_enabled: Enabled ✓ — only verified facts land in the ODD; the rest stays ephemeral.
web_toggle_title: Web: current answers with sources (Groq compound)
web_mode_hint: Web mode on: current, sourced answers from the web via Groq compound. The model picker above is ignored.
